Visualization Tools
===================

Visualize feature rankings, intersections, and stability matrices.

Tools covered
-------------

- Ranking bar plots
- Intersection heatmaps
- Upset plots
- Stability visualizations

Example
-------

.. code-block:: python

   import numpy as np
   from pyensemblefs.viz.visualizer import Visualizer

   # Define ranking_scores with feature indices sorted by importance
   ranking_scores = np.array([2, 5, 1, 7, 3, 0, 4, 6, 8, 9])

   # Optional: define feature names
   feature_names = [f"feature_{i}" for i in range(10)]

   # Plot consensus ranking
   Visualizer.consensus_ranking(
      ranking=ranking_scores,
      top_k=10,
      feature_names=feature_names,
      title="Feature Ranking Consensus")

.. code-block:: python
   import numpy as np
   from pyensemblefs.viz.visualizer import Visualizer

   # Define ranking_scores as selection frequencies (values between 0 and 1)
   ranking_scores = np.array([0.95, 0.87, 0.76, 0.65, 0.54, 0.43, 0.32, 0.21, 0.10, 0.05])

   # Define corresponding feature names
   feature_names = [f"feature_{i}" for i in range(len(ranking_scores))]

   # Plot frequency distribution
   Visualizer.plot_topk_frequency(
      feature_names=feature_names,
      frequencies=ranking_scores,
      title="Feature Selection Frequency",
      annotate=True,
      savepath=None  # Change to "output/ranking.png" to save
   )

.. code-block:: python
   import numpy as np
   from pyensemblefs.viz import ranking

   # Define ranking_scores
   ranking_scores = np.array([2, 5, 1, 7, 3, 0, 4, 6, 8, 9])
   feature_names = [f"feature_{i}" for i in range(10)]

   # Plot consensus ranking
   ranking.consensus_ranking(
      ranking=ranking_scores,
      feature_names=feature_names,
      top_k=10,
      title="Feature Ranking"
   )
